TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen, title = Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen} }

S.FORM: == Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen Ś§™ť≠ĮťĖ£ŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí == Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen " Taluku a kamu: Rngayan qmita kana klwaan Truku" u Cung-hau-min-kuo sakasepat nu nipatidenga tu kanatal kunyen. sakatusa a nikalepacawan nu kanatal a tataydaan midang, caysiwwalnem mihcaan cacay bulad caytu demiad pakatineng tu kiyaku, caysiwwalnem mihcaan caycay bulad tuwal demiad mapatideng ku mamikuwan a kakulian. Itida i Taywan Walian, milakuuyt tu Kalinku, Tayciu, Nantuo tulu a naniyadu'an. ilabu idaw ku wali nitipan a mibetasay tu buyu'a dadanan, pangangan han u Cungheng dadan. picidekan nu Tayluku a kuo-cia-kun-yen u dihep atu nanggay, mutikel tu ku nanggay, bangcal sapi'," Tay-lu-ke nangnanggayan" sisa singangan tu sakawalu nu Taywan aaidangan. duma satu ilabu nu buyubuyuan idaw henay ku madiputay nu yadahay a kacudetay nu nanum a mahicaay nu nanumay a cilekayan, mahida u buting aca. . "Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen" tada mutikel tu ku nanggay, sasawacan, ahebalay nu lalaliwan nu nanum malasapihpih ku lalaliwan atu dihep nu kitidaan, matatungus tu kitakid nu namakababalakiay nu malucekay tu sakapitu: atu sawsawni celak saca a talakaw, sisa masatanektekay nu talakaway a dihepan nu aadihan a Tayluke, u canancanan nu yadahay atu picidekan nu matatungusay i kitakidan a nikasinganganan tu mamalucek a sakasiwan nu silacan, sisa, caay henay ka lungad ku nipalumaan tu kilakilangan, sisa yadah ku canancanan nu tuudan a aadupan tu sasapapahanhannan yadah ku mhicacay a aadupan atu caayay a sausi nu cancanan, masasuida namin ku nuheni, matatungusay nu kitikid a naliwnan namaka babalakiay ni tukian nu matatungusay a sakacacay a bataan , sisa ina wen-ha-pu mapili' u Taywan kitakid namaka babalakiay a liwan nu tataydaan midang. " . ngangan ŚźćÁ®Ī "Tayluke" atu " Taluku" nina sulit u namaka Tayluke binacadan nipanganganan tu " Truku". sabaw enem a secian nu ayaw nikudan, Sedi'k tademaw namaka Nan-tuo milakuuyt tu Cung-yen-san-may a buyu'an mabulaw taynin i Kalingku a Li-u'-si, Mu-kua-si, sa muenengay i Kalingkuay a binacadan tu palutatengaan tu udip, sisa pangngan han tu " Tayluke binacadan". tada ngihan u " Truku", i kaDipunan singangan tu "Taroko", nikahinian tunika enengan nu heni itini tu kasingangan. " "Truku".16 "Truku" ,śó•ś≤ĽśôāśúüŤĘęÁ®ĪÁāļ"Taroko" ," . luitś≠∑ŚŹ≤ś≤ŅťĚ© nina kiyaku taneng tanuayawan ku nipilalaba tu kaDipunan nu kiyaku a Tayluke kuocia kungyen. Caysiwlupic mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku pitu a demiadan, Tay-wan-cung-tu-hu Kuo-li-kun-yen pakatineng " sakatusa nu talakaw Tayluke Kuoli kunyen" mapatideng, pasu aydaay a Sea-san atu Tay-lu-ke a kitidaan, nikitidaan makaala tu tusa abataan idaw ku pitu a wangan nu kubuan, nika i ka Dipunan hedeken palawpesen. 65 263 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku enem nu mihcaan tu siwa a bulad, Taywan nu hitay a sakakaay ci Ten-cun-liw, itida i Kalinku mididaw sa itida i Tayluke sacumud atu ilabuay nu talakaway mu buis a tademaw ci Sun-pen-ta-cuo, Lin-ten-hu-kun, Di-cu mapulung a misasing. 1936ŚĻī 9śúą, . katukuh tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcaan, u Sin-cen-yen mapatucek tu " Taywan kitidaan nu pulung sapitadas a kiyaku", patucek hank u Tayluke a kitidaan, Cung-heng dadan, He-hun-san itidaay atu Su-hua dadan u kanatal a kunyen atu kanatal a dadan nu kunyen, sadikuday i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idw ku sepat a mihcaan mihedek tu nikakenihan tu kanatal a kunyenan. Cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku enem a mihcaan sabaw cacay a bulad sabaw tusa a demiad, kiyaku nu Tayluke kanatal a kunyen tatengan pakatineng, kitidaan nu kanatal a kunyen timul amis nu tanayu hakiya makaala tu 38 kun-li, wali nutipan a ahebal hakiya makaala tu 41 kun-li, kitidaan pulung han 92,000 a kubuan, mapulung tu kakulian pasuKalinku Siw-lin-sing 74,800 a kubuan, Tay-cung-se he-pin-ci 9,500 kubu atu Nan-tuo-sin Zen-ay-sing 7,700 kubu, Tayluke kanatal kun-yen pipahalhalan atu sayaway nu sakakaay a cu'-cen u Kuo-li-tun-hua-ta-sye ce-zan-ce-yen kun-li yen-ciw-suo u sakakaay ci Si-kuo-se. Ťá≥1979ŚĻī, . tuseptusip mihcaan sepat bulad tulu demiad, ninelan nu Kalingku mapelad ku Tayluke kanatal kunyen, micidek ku caculilan i buyubuyuan, dekalun caculilan, padaicawan a caculilan, sakatang caculilan, payyeng caculilan atu cemu sangaw caculilan a aaidangan atu sakayhekal nu dadanan mamin mapelad, pinaay hakiya nu taydaay midang a maduka mapatay atu pinaay nu malebutan a midangay mapulu' i labu nu aaidangan, tawya nikaninelan nu Tayluke kanatal kun-yen mikuwanay patahekal musakamu acaay pacumud tu tayniay midang sa, misangaay a tademaw ayaan hakiya a masangan nai' ku watan, pu'tan ku sakatayda katukuh tu nikakapah kiya tawya musakamu taneng tu a micumud sa. 2024ŚĻī4śúą3śó•, . hida sananay a liwliw Ťá™ÁĄ∂ÁíįŚĘÉ kanatal aidangan mitulin tu Tay-pin-yeng, Cung-yen-sa-may amis milakuuyt tu aaidangan, satalakaway nu aaidangan makaala tu 3,742 kunce a Nan-hu buyu'. talakaw makaala tu tulu a malebut nu pinaay anika talakawan nu cu'detay a kitidaan kakitidaan makaala tu kanatal kun-yen a liklikan tu 7.2%, saka itini i cacay a lasubuan nu Taywan tu buyu' an nu pulung tu sakatusa a bataan idaw ku pitu a buyu'an. cacay a malebut katukuh tulu a malebut nu dihekuay a buyu'an nu kitidaan mamin makaala tu 78.4%, salikelun 55% a kitidaan miala tu aaidangan tu 44.7%. 44.7%. nanum namakaydaay namin i Cung-yen-san-may nu nikakenisan a nananuman, walian nu angangan u Li-u-si kapulungan a nanuman, miala tu kanatal a lalaan 65.7%, adidi' ku i Mu-kua-si atu San-cen-si nu lalaliwan nu nanuman, tipan makakenih u Ta-cia-si atu Cuo-suu-si pabawan, ninatusaay a masabanaway a tangkuan miala tu kanatal tu lala'an a 20%. 20%. pulung nu timul, amis talakaw ku lala', iteban han u O-ya-ba'tu atu Huy-li-pin ba'tu sakababateluan a kakenisan atu Tay-pin-yen nutipan a kacaledesan kasibaliyusan nu tabakiay a udadan nu kitidaan, sisa mahicaay kiya kina kitidaan. matulin tu a misaamelik misangan tu buyu'an, atu Li-u-si kasenu' sa mahetik, malamahicaay kiya a buyu'an, u dihep han tu. likecu ku Tay-lu-ke mala V yan nu daylisiki a dihepan, ilabu milakuuyt tu 1,000 kun-ce, kibetul nu daylisiki u kibetul makaala tu malebut nu pina a kun-cean, nikalahatan makaala tu pina nu cacay a bataan nu ku-lian. ŚÖ®ŚćÄŚćó, V . maudipay nu canacanan ÁĒüśÖč saan ku nipikinsaan, ilabu idaw tu kunikaadihan tu tuudan nu canananan nu maudipay a cicilekayan tu 1,517 an. ilabu nu buyubuyu'an idaw ku 46 a micucuay nu aadupan, mikiala tu Tay-wan i enelay nu micucuay a aadupan tu pangkiwan. sabaw lima ku nu Taywanay a micidekay nu aadupan, i Taywan u nueduan ku sayadahay a aadupan.u ayam hantu makaala tu 173 a canancananan, pasuTaywan picidekan nu ayaman makaala tu 24 a kakenisan, nikakenisan namaka Cung-heng dadan Ta-yi-lin katukuh i Ce-n sayadahay nu ayaman itida. . tademaw lalangawan nu aadihanšļļśĖáśôĮŤßÄ ayda idaw tu kunikaadihan tu liwan namaka babalakiay, itida i Li-u-si tapang nu kawanan, panan nu Tayluku nu ayawan 100 nu pina a kun-ce pabaway nu nanuman, micapiay tu kanatal kun-yen kiyakuan a Hu-se liwan nu namaka babalakiay a kitidaan, katukuh ayda makaala tu 2,000 a luitan. kanatal kun-yen naw Tayluku a binacadan nu kitidaan, Malahat kina niyadu', dumaan tu a niyadu'an inai' tu ku muenengay. . Cin-tun-ce sabaw tulu a mihcaan "caywalpicsip mihcaan" katukuh Kun-sui tusa a mihcaan " caywalpicnem mihcaan" sa, tayniyan ni Sen-paw-cen itini i Taywan misangan tu tuluay a dadanan sapitulun tu wali, nutipan nu dadan a " amisa dadan", itawyaay a nikilukan tu sayaway nu sakakaay misangaay tu dadanan, katukuh tu kaDipunan mibelihaca misangan, u aydaay nu Su-hua-kun-lu. kaDipunan u sihu t uku misangaay tu He-hun-san dadan atu nikudan u Cung-hua-min-kuo sisu misanga tu Cung-hen-kun-lu, malailabuay nu angangangan nu sakatahekal a dadan nu aaidangan. ta-cen sepatay a mihcaan " caysiwcaylim mihcaan", panan nu Tayluke misangan tu sapilakuuyt tu Li-u-si a "sin-hun-ciw", u tawyaay nu micumuday tu Tayluke dihep a sayaway nu telayay a dadanan, nikalepacawan satu nikudan sumad han u "cen-cun-ciw".
S.PHON: == taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô-kuo- ¶ia-kun-j…ôn ******* == taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô-kuo- ¶ia-kun-j…ôn " tar~…ĺuku a kamu: *Ňčajan *mita kana kr~…ĺwaan truku" u ¶uŇč-ńßau-min-kuo sakas…ôpat nu nipatid…ôŇča tu kanatar~…ĺ kunj…ôn. sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kanatar~…ĺ a tatajdaan midaŇč, ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺn…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad ¶ajtu d…ômiad pakatin…ôŇč tu kijaku, ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺn…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj ¶aj bur~…ĺad tuwar~…ĺ d…ômiad mapatid…ôŇč ku mamikuwan a kakur~…ĺian. itida i tajwan war~…ĺian, mir~…ĺakuujt tu kar~…ĺinku, taj ¶iu, nantuo tur~…ĺu a nanijadu Ē~ °an. ir~…ĺabu idaw ku war~…ĺi nitipan a mib…ôtasaj tu buju Ē~ °a dadanan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan u ¶uŇčńß…ôŇč dadan. pi ¶id…ôkan nu tajr~…ĺuku a kuo- ¶ia-kun-j…ôn u dińß…ôp atu naŇčgaj, mutik…ôr~…ĺ tu ku naŇčgaj, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sapi Ē~ °," taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô naŇčnaŇčgajan" sisa siŇčaŇčan tu sakawar~…ĺu nu tajwan aaidaŇčan. duma satu ir~…ĺabu nu bujubujuan idaw ńß…ônaj ku madiputaj nu jadańßaj a ka ¶ud…ôtaj nu nanum a mańßi ¶aaj nu nanumaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan, mańßida u butiŇč a ¶a. . **.*%, sar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺun **% a kitidaan miar~…ĺa tu aaidaŇčan tu **.*%. **.*%. nanum namakajdaaj namin i ¶uŇč-j…ôn-san-maj nu nikak…ônisan a nananuman, war~…ĺian nu aŇčaŇčan u r~…ĺi-u-si kapur~…ĺuŇčan a nanuman, miar~…ĺa tu kanatar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺaan **.*%, adidi Ē~ ° ku i mu-kua-si atu san- ¶…ôn-si nu r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwan nu nanuman, tipan makak…ônińß u ta- ¶ia-si atu ¶uo-suu-si pabawan, ninatusaaj a masabanawaj a taŇčkuan miar~…ĺa tu kanatar~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an a **%. **%. pur~…ĺuŇč nu timur~…ĺ, amis tar~…ĺakaw ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, it…ôban ńßan u o-ja-ba Ē~ °tu atu ńßuj-r~…ĺi-pin ba Ē~ °tu sakababat…ôr~…ĺuan a kak…ônisan atu taj-pin-j…ôn nutipan a ka ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôsan kasibar~…ĺijusan nu tabakiaj a udadan nu kitidaan, sisa mańßi ¶aaj kija kina kitidaan. matur~…ĺin tu a misaam…ôr~…ĺik misaŇčan tu buju Ē~ °an, atu r~…ĺi-u-si kas…ônu Ē~ ° sa mańß…ôtik, mar~…ĺamańßi ¶aaj kija a buju Ē~ °an, u dińß…ôp ńßan tu. r~…ĺik…ô ¶u ku taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô mar~…ĺa * jan nu dajr~…ĺisiki a dińß…ôpan, ir~…ĺabu mir~…ĺakuujt tu *,*** kun- ¶…ô, kib…ôtur~…ĺ nu dajr~…ĺisiki u kib…ôtur~…ĺ makaar~…ĺa tu mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu pina a kun- ¶…ôan, nikar~…ĺańßatan makaar~…ĺa tu pina nu ¶a ¶aj a bataan nu ku-r~…ĺian. ***, * . maudipaj nu ¶ana ¶anan ** saan ku nipikinsaan, ir~…ĺabu idaw tu kunikaadińßan tu tuudan nu ¶anananan nu maudipaj a ¶i ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan tu *,*** an. ir~…ĺabu nu bujubuju Ē~ °an idaw ku ** a mi ¶u ¶uaj nu aadupan, mikiar~…ĺa tu taj-wan i …ôn…ôr~…ĺaj nu mi ¶u ¶uaj a aadupan tu paŇčkiwan. sabaw r~…ĺima ku nu tajwanaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj nu aadupan, i tajwan u nu…ôduan ku sajadańßaj a aadupan.u ajam ńßantu makaar~…ĺa tu *** a ¶anan ¶ananan, pasutajwan pi ¶id…ôkan nu ajaman makaar~…ĺa tu ** a kak…ônisan, nikak…ônisan namaka ¶uŇč-ńß…ôŇč dadan ta-ji-r~…ĺin katukuńß i ¶…ô-n sajadańßaj nu ajaman itida. . tad…ômaw r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu aadińßan**** ajda idaw tu kunikaadińßan tu r~…ĺiwan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj, itida i r~…ĺi-u-si tapaŇč nu kawanan, panan nu tajr~…ĺuku nu ajawan *** nu pina a kun- ¶…ô pabawaj nu nanuman, mi ¶apiaj tu kanatar~…ĺ kun-j…ôn kijakuan a ńßu-s…ô r~…ĺiwan nu namaka babar~…ĺakiaj a kitidaan, katukuńß ajda makaar~…ĺa tu *,*** a r~…ĺuitan. kanatar~…ĺ kun-j…ôn naw tajr~…ĺuku a bina ¶adan nu kitidaan, mar~…ĺańßat kina nijadu Ē~ °, dumaan tu a nijadu Ē~ °an inai Ē~ ° tu ku mu…ôn…ôŇčaj. . ¶in-tun- ¶…ô sabaw tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶sip mińß ¶aan" katukuńß kun-sui tusa a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajwar~…ĺpi ¶n…ôm mińß ¶aan" sa, tajnijan ni s…ôn-paw- ¶…ôn itini i tajwan misaŇčan tu tur~…ĺuaj a dadanan sapitur~…ĺun tu war~…ĺi, nutipan nu dadan a " amisa dadan", itawjaaj a nikir~…ĺukan tu sajawaj nu sakakaaj misaŇčaaj tu dadanan, katukuńß tu kadipunan mib…ôr~…ĺińßa ¶a misaŇčan, u ajdaaj nu su-ńßua-kun-r~…ĺu. kadipunan u sińßu t uku misaŇčaaj tu ńß…ô-ńßun-san dadan atu nikudan u ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo sisu misaŇča tu ¶uŇč-ńß…ôn-kun-r~…ĺu, mar~…ĺair~…ĺabuaj nu aŇčaŇčaŇčan nu sakatańß…ôkar~…ĺ a dadan nu aaidaŇčan. ta- ¶…ôn s…ôpataj a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajsiw ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan", panan nu tajr~…ĺuk…ô misaŇčan tu sapir~…ĺakuujt tu r~…ĺi-u-si a "sin-ńßun- ¶iw", u tawjaaj nu mi ¶umudaj tu tajr~…ĺuk…ô dińß…ôp a sajawaj nu t…ôr~…ĺajaj a dadanan, nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan satu nikudan sumad ńßan u " ¶…ôn- ¶un- ¶iw".
S.FORM: == Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen Ś§™ť≠ĮťĖ£ŚúčŚģ∂ŚÖ¨Śúí == Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen " Taluku a kamu: Rngayan qmita kana klwaan Truku" u Cung-hau-min-kuo sakasepat nu nipatidenga tu kanatal kunyen. sakatusa a nikalepacawan nu kanatal a tataydaan midang, caysiwwalnem mihcaan cacay bulad caytu demiad pakatineng tu kiyaku, caysiwwalnem mihcaan caycay bulad tuwal demiad mapatideng ku mamikuwan a kakulian. Itida i Taywan Walian, milakuuyt tu Kalinku, Tayciu, Nantuo tulu a naniyadu'an. ilabu idaw ku wali nitipan a mibetasay tu buyu'a dadanan, pangangan han u Cungheng dadan. picidekan nu Tayluku a kuo-cia-kun-yen u dihep atu nanggay, mutikel tu ku nanggay, bangcal sapi'," Tay-lu-ke nangnanggayan" sisa singangan tu sakawalu nu Taywan aaidangan. duma satu ilabu nu buyubuyuan idaw henay ku madiputay nu yadahay a kacudetay nu nanum a mahicaay nu nanumay a cilekayan, mahida u buting aca. . "Tay-lu-ke-kuo-cia-kun-yen" tada mutikel tu ku nanggay, sasawacan, ahebalay nu lalaliwan nu nanum malasapihpih ku lalaliwan atu dihep nu kitidaan, matatungus tu kitakid nu namakababalakiay nu malucekay tu sakapitu: atu sawsawni celak saca a talakaw, sisa masatanektekay nu talakaway a dihepan nu aadihan a Tayluke, u canancanan nu yadahay atu picidekan nu matatungusay i kitakidan a nikasinganganan tu mamalucek a sakasiwan nu silacan, sisa, caay henay ka lungad ku nipalumaan tu kilakilangan, sisa yadah ku canancanan nu tuudan a aadupan tu sasapapahanhannan yadah ku mhicacay a aadupan atu caayay a sausi nu cancanan, masasuida namin ku nuheni, matatungusay nu kitikid a naliwnan namaka babalakiay ni tukian nu matatungusay a sakacacay a bataan , sisa ina wen-ha-pu mapili' u Taywan kitakid namaka babalakiay a liwan nu tataydaan midang. " . ngangan ŚźćÁ®Ī "Tayluke" atu " Taluku" nina sulit u namaka Tayluke binacadan nipanganganan tu " Truku". sabaw enem a secian nu ayaw nikudan, Sedi'k tademaw namaka Nan-tuo milakuuyt tu Cung-yen-san-may a buyu'an mabulaw taynin i Kalingku a Li-u'-si, Mu-kua-si, sa muenengay i Kalingkuay a binacadan tu palutatengaan tu udip, sisa pangngan han tu " Tayluke binacadan". tada ngihan u " Truku", i kaDipunan singangan tu "Taroko", nikahinian tunika enengan nu heni itini tu kasingangan. " "Truku".16 "Truku" ,śó•ś≤ĽśôāśúüŤĘęÁ®ĪÁāļ"Taroko" ," . luitś≠∑ŚŹ≤ś≤ŅťĚ© nina kiyaku taneng tanuayawan ku nipilalaba tu kaDipunan nu kiyaku a Tayluke kuocia kungyen. Caysiwlupic mihcaan sabaw tusa a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku pitu a demiadan, Tay-wan-cung-tu-hu Kuo-li-kun-yen pakatineng " sakatusa nu talakaw Tayluke Kuoli kunyen" mapatideng, pasu aydaay a Sea-san atu Tay-lu-ke a kitidaan, nikitidaan makaala tu tusa abataan idaw ku pitu a wangan nu kubuan, nika i ka Dipunan hedeken palawpesen. 65 263 . cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu tulu a bataan idaw ku enem nu mihcaan tu siwa a bulad, Taywan nu hitay a sakakaay ci Ten-cun-liw, itida i Kalinku mididaw sa itida i Tayluke sacumud atu ilabuay nu talakaway mu buis a tademaw ci Sun-pen-ta-cuo, Lin-ten-hu-kun, Di-cu mapulung a misasing. 1936ŚĻī 9śúą, . katukuh tu cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu pitu a bataan idaw ku siwa a mihcaan, u Sin-cen-yen mapatucek tu " Taywan kitidaan nu pulung sapitadas a kiyaku", patucek hank u Tayluke a kitidaan, Cung-heng dadan, He-hun-san itidaay atu Su-hua dadan u kanatal a kunyen atu kanatal a dadan nu kunyen, sadikuday i cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idw ku sepat a mihcaan mihedek tu nikakenihan tu kanatal a kunyenan. Cacay a malebut siwa a lasubu walu a bataan idaw ku enem a mihcaan sabaw cacay a bulad sabaw tusa a demiad, kiyaku nu Tayluke kanatal a kunyen tatengan pakatineng, kitidaan nu kanatal a kunyen timul amis nu tanayu hakiya makaala tu 38 kun-li, wali nutipan a ahebal hakiya makaala tu 41 kun-li, kitidaan pulung han 92,000 a kubuan, mapulung tu kakulian pasuKalinku Siw-lin-sing 74,800 a kubuan, Tay-cung-se he-pin-ci 9,500 kubu atu Nan-tuo-sin Zen-ay-sing 7,700 kubu, Tayluke kanatal kun-yen pipahalhalan atu sayaway nu sakakaay a cu'-cen u Kuo-li-tun-hua-ta-sye ce-zan-ce-yen kun-li yen-ciw-suo u sakakaay ci Si-kuo-se. Ťá≥1979ŚĻī, . tuseptusip mihcaan sepat bulad tulu demiad, ninelan nu Kalingku mapelad ku Tayluke kanatal kunyen, micidek ku caculilan i buyubuyuan, dekalun caculilan, padaicawan a caculilan, sakatang caculilan, payyeng caculilan atu cemu sangaw caculilan a aaidangan atu sakayhekal nu dadanan mamin mapelad, pinaay hakiya nu taydaay midang a maduka mapatay atu pinaay nu malebutan a midangay mapulu' i labu nu aaidangan, tawya nikaninelan nu Tayluke kanatal kun-yen mikuwanay patahekal musakamu acaay pacumud tu tayniay midang sa, misangaay a tademaw ayaan hakiya a masangan nai' ku watan, pu'tan ku sakatayda katukuh tu nikakapah kiya tawya musakamu taneng tu a micumud sa. 2024ŚĻī4śúą3śó•, . hida sananay a liwliw Ťá™ÁĄ∂ÁíįŚĘÉ kanatal aidangan mitulin tu Tay-pin-yeng, Cung-yen-sa-may amis milakuuyt tu aaidangan, satalakaway nu aaidangan makaala tu 3,742 kunce a Nan-hu buyu'. talakaw makaala tu tulu a malebut nu pinaay anika talakawan nu cu'detay a kitidaan kakitidaan makaala tu kanatal kun-yen a liklikan tu 7.2%, saka itini i cacay a lasubuan nu Taywan tu buyu' an nu pulung tu sakatusa a bataan idaw ku pitu a buyu'an. cacay a malebut katukuh tulu a malebut nu dihekuay a buyu'an nu kitidaan mamin makaala tu 78.4%, salikelun 55% a kitidaan miala tu aaidangan tu 44.7%. 44.7%. nanum namakaydaay namin i Cung-yen-san-may nu nikakenisan a nananuman, walian nu angangan u Li-u-si kapulungan a nanuman, miala tu kanatal a lalaan 65.7%, adidi' ku i Mu-kua-si atu San-cen-si nu lalaliwan nu nanuman, tipan makakenih u Ta-cia-si atu Cuo-suu-si pabawan, ninatusaay a masabanaway a tangkuan miala tu kanatal tu lala'an a 20%. 20%. pulung nu timul, amis talakaw ku lala', iteban han u O-ya-ba'tu atu Huy-li-pin ba'tu sakababateluan a kakenisan atu Tay-pin-yen nutipan a kacaledesan kasibaliyusan nu tabakiay a udadan nu kitidaan, sisa mahicaay kiya kina kitidaan. matulin tu a misaamelik misangan tu buyu'an, atu Li-u-si kasenu' sa mahetik, malamahicaay kiya a buyu'an, u dihep han tu. likecu ku Tay-lu-ke mala V yan nu daylisiki a dihepan, ilabu milakuuyt tu 1,000 kun-ce, kibetul nu daylisiki u kibetul makaala tu malebut nu pina a kun-cean, nikalahatan makaala tu pina nu cacay a bataan nu ku-lian. ŚÖ®ŚćÄŚćó, V . maudipay nu canacanan ÁĒüśÖč saan ku nipikinsaan, ilabu idaw tu kunikaadihan tu tuudan nu canananan nu maudipay a cicilekayan tu 1,517 an. ilabu nu buyubuyu'an idaw ku 46 a micucuay nu aadupan, mikiala tu Tay-wan i enelay nu micucuay a aadupan tu pangkiwan. sabaw lima ku nu Taywanay a micidekay nu aadupan, i Taywan u nueduan ku sayadahay a aadupan.u ayam hantu makaala tu 173 a canancananan, pasuTaywan picidekan nu ayaman makaala tu 24 a kakenisan, nikakenisan namaka Cung-heng dadan Ta-yi-lin katukuh i Ce-n sayadahay nu ayaman itida. . tademaw lalangawan nu aadihanšļļśĖáśôĮŤßÄ ayda idaw tu kunikaadihan tu liwan namaka babalakiay, itida i Li-u-si tapang nu kawanan, panan nu Tayluku nu ayawan 100 nu pina a kun-ce pabaway nu nanuman, micapiay tu kanatal kun-yen kiyakuan a Hu-se liwan nu namaka babalakiay a kitidaan, katukuh ayda makaala tu 2,000 a luitan. kanatal kun-yen naw Tayluku a binacadan nu kitidaan, Malahat kina niyadu', dumaan tu a niyadu'an inai' tu ku muenengay. . Cin-tun-ce sabaw tulu a mihcaan "caywalpicsip mihcaan" katukuh Kun-sui tusa a mihcaan " caywalpicnem mihcaan" sa, tayniyan ni Sen-paw-cen itini i Taywan misangan tu tuluay a dadanan sapitulun tu wali, nutipan nu dadan a " amisa dadan", itawyaay a nikilukan tu sayaway nu sakakaay misangaay tu dadanan, katukuh tu kaDipunan mibelihaca misangan, u aydaay nu Su-hua-kun-lu. kaDipunan u sihu t uku misangaay tu He-hun-san dadan atu nikudan u Cung-hua-min-kuo sisu misanga tu Cung-hen-kun-lu, malailabuay nu angangangan nu sakatahekal a dadan nu aaidangan. ta-cen sepatay a mihcaan " caysiwcaylim mihcaan", panan nu Tayluke misangan tu sapilakuuyt tu Li-u-si a "sin-hun-ciw", u tawyaay nu micumuday tu Tayluke dihep a sayaway nu telayay a dadanan, nikalepacawan satu nikudan sumad han u "cen-cun-ciw".
S.PHON: == taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô-kuo- ¶ia-kun-j…ôn ******* == taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô-kuo- ¶ia-kun-j…ôn " tar~…ĺuku a kamu: *Ňčajan *mita kana kr~…ĺwaan truku" u ¶uŇč-ńßau-min-kuo sakas…ôpat nu nipatid…ôŇča tu kanatar~…ĺ kunj…ôn. sakatusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan nu kanatar~…ĺ a tatajdaan midaŇč, ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺn…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj bur~…ĺad ¶ajtu d…ômiad pakatin…ôŇč tu kijaku, ¶ajsiwwar~…ĺn…ôm mińß ¶aan ¶aj ¶aj bur~…ĺad tuwar~…ĺ d…ômiad mapatid…ôŇč ku mamikuwan a kakur~…ĺian. itida i tajwan war~…ĺian, mir~…ĺakuujt tu kar~…ĺinku, taj ¶iu, nantuo tur~…ĺu a nanijadu Ē~ °an. ir~…ĺabu idaw ku war~…ĺi nitipan a mib…ôtasaj tu buju Ē~ °a dadanan, paŇčaŇčan ńßan u ¶uŇčńß…ôŇč dadan. pi ¶id…ôkan nu tajr~…ĺuku a kuo- ¶ia-kun-j…ôn u dińß…ôp atu naŇčgaj, mutik…ôr~…ĺ tu ku naŇčgaj, baŇč ¶ar~…ĺ sapi Ē~ °," taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô naŇčnaŇčgajan" sisa siŇčaŇčan tu sakawar~…ĺu nu tajwan aaidaŇčan. duma satu ir~…ĺabu nu bujubujuan idaw ńß…ônaj ku madiputaj nu jadańßaj a ka ¶ud…ôtaj nu nanum a mańßi ¶aaj nu nanumaj a ¶ir~…ĺ…ôkajan, mańßida u butiŇč a ¶a. . "taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô-kuo- ¶ia-kun-j…ôn" tada mutik…ôr~…ĺ tu ku naŇčgaj, sasawa ¶an, ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwan nu nanum mar~…ĺasapińßpińß ku r~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwan atu dińß…ôp nu kitidaan, matatuŇčus tu kitakid nu namakababar~…ĺakiaj nu mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj tu sakapitu: atu sawsawni ¶…ôr~…ĺak sa ¶a a tar~…ĺakaw, sisa masatan…ôkt…ôkaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj a dińß…ôpan nu aadińßan a tajr~…ĺuk…ô, u ¶anan ¶anan nu jadańßaj atu pi ¶id…ôkan nu matatuŇčusaj i kitakidan a nikasiŇčaŇčanan tu mamar~…ĺu ¶…ôk a sakasiwan nu sir~…ĺa ¶an, sisa, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka r~…ĺuŇčad ku nipar~…ĺumaan tu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, sisa jadańß ku ¶anan ¶anan nu tuudan a aadupan tu sasapapańßanńßannan jadańß ku mńßi ¶a ¶aj a aadupan atu ¶aajaj a sausi nu ¶an ¶anan, masasuida namin ku nuńß…ôni, matatuŇčusaj nu kitikid a nar~…ĺiwnan namaka babar~…ĺakiaj ni tukian nu matatuŇčusaj a saka ¶a ¶aj a bataan , sisa ina w…ôn-ńßa-pu mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° u tajwan kitakid namaka babar~…ĺakiaj a r~…ĺiwan nu tatajdaan midaŇč. " . ŇčaŇčan ** "tajr~…ĺuk…ô" atu " tar~…ĺuku" nina sur~…ĺit u namaka tajr~…ĺuk…ô bina ¶adan nipaŇčaŇčanan tu " truku". sabaw …ôn…ôm a s…ô ¶ian nu ajaw nikudan, s…ôdi Ē~ °k tad…ômaw namaka nan-tuo mir~…ĺakuujt tu ¶uŇč-j…ôn-san-maj a buju Ē~ °an mabur~…ĺaw tajnin i kar~…ĺiŇčku a r~…ĺi-u Ē~ °-si, mu-kua-si, sa mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i kar~…ĺiŇčkuaj a bina ¶adan tu par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan tu udip, sisa paŇčŇčan ńßan tu " tajr~…ĺuk…ô bina ¶adan". tada Ňčińßan u " truku", i kadipunan siŇčaŇčan tu "taroko", nikańßinian tunika …ôn…ôŇčan nu ńß…ôni itini tu kasiŇčaŇčan. " "truku".** "truku" ,*******"taroko" ," . r~…ĺuit**** nina kijaku tan…ôŇč tanuajawan ku nipir~…ĺar~…ĺaba tu kadipunan nu kijaku a tajr~…ĺuk…ô kuo ¶ia kuŇčj…ôn. ¶ajsiwr~…ĺupi ¶ mińß ¶aan sabaw tusa a bur~…ĺad tusa a bataan idaw ku pitu a d…ômiadan, taj-wan- ¶uŇč-tu-ńßu kuo-r~…ĺi-kun-j…ôn pakatin…ôŇč " sakatusa nu tar~…ĺakaw tajr~…ĺuk…ô kuor~…ĺi kunj…ôn" mapatid…ôŇč, pasu ajdaaj a s…ôa-san atu taj-r~…ĺu-k…ô a kitidaan, nikitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu tusa abataan idaw ku pitu a waŇčan nu kubuan, nika i ka dipunan ńß…ôd…ôk…ôn par~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn. ** *** . ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu tur~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm nu mińß ¶aan tu siwa a bur~…ĺad, tajwan nu ńßitaj a sakakaaj ¶i t…ôn- ¶un-r~…ĺiw, itida i kar~…ĺinku mididaw sa itida i tajr~…ĺuk…ô sa ¶umud atu ir~…ĺabuaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj mu ¶…ôn-j…ôn mapatu ¶…ôk tu " tajwan kitidaan nu pur~…ĺuŇč sapitadas a kijaku", patu ¶…ôk ńßank u tajr~…ĺuk…ô a kitidaan, ¶uŇč-ńß…ôŇč dadan, ńß…ô-ńßun-san itidaaj atu su-ńßua dadan u kanatar~…ĺ a kunj…ôn atu kanatar~…ĺ a dadan nu kunj…ôn, sadikudaj i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idw ku s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan mińß…ôd…ôk tu nikak…ônińßan tu kanatar~…ĺ a kunj…ônan. ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut siwa a r~…ĺasubu war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶aan sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw tusa a d…ômiad, kijaku nu tajr~…ĺuk…ô kanatar~…ĺ a kunj…ôn tat…ôŇčan pakatin…ôŇč, kitidaan nu tu kakur~…ĺian pasukar~…ĺinku siw-r~…ĺin-siŇč **,*** a kubuan, taj- ¶uŇč-s…ô ńß…ô-pin- ¶i *,*** kubu atu nan-tuo-sin z…ôn-aj-siŇč *,*** kubu, tajr~…ĺuk…ô kanatar~…ĺ kun-j…ôn pipańßar~…ĺńßar~…ĺan atu sajawaj nu sakakaaj a ¶u Ē~ °- ¶…ôn u kuo-r~…ĺi-tun-ńßua-ta-sj…ô ¶…ô-zan- ¶…ô-j…ôn kun-r~…ĺi j…ôn- ¶iw-suo u sakakaaj ¶i si-kuo-s…ô. ******, . tus…ôptusip mińß ¶aan s…ôpat bur~…ĺad tur~…ĺu d…ômiad, nin…ôr~…ĺan nu kar~…ĺiŇčku map…ôr~…ĺad ku tajr~…ĺuk…ô kanatar~…ĺ kunj…ôn, mi ¶id…ôk ku ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan i bujubujuan, d…ôkar~…ĺun ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, padai ¶awan a ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, sakataŇč ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan, pajj…ôŇč ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan atu ¶…ômu saŇčaw ¶a ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan a aaidaŇčan atu sakajńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu dadanan mamin map…ôr~…ĺad, pinaaj ńßakija nu tajdaaj midaŇč a maduka mapataj atu pinaaj nu
